title: CuTe Learning - Education with Empathy
headings: Ready to transform your child's education?
content: About Us Learn Pricing Blog Contact Us CuTe App About Us Learn Pricing Blog Contact Us Back to Pricing The Complete Experience Alternative Education Program A complete learning program that supports your child across all subjects, skills, and real understanding. ₹30,000 Per Month This plan is designed as a full alternative to traditional schooling. Instead of crowded classrooms, your child receives structured, in-depth learning with intense personal attention. Daily 2 to 3 Hour Sessions Students attend comprehensive daily sessions guided by multiple mentors and subject experts, ensuring they get the absolute best support in every single academic area. Everything Included in the Program All Subjects Covered Dedicated focus across the entire curriculum, leaving no gaps in their knowledge. Skill Development We teach real-world skills alongside academics to prepare them for life, not just exams. Expert Mentorship Continuous guidance from a team of mentors dedicated to your child's holistic growth. Advanced Analytics Detailed performance reports for each subject, showing how different areas connect and impact overall progress. Physical Deliverable Practical Learning Home Kits To make learning truly practical, students receive exclusive home kits for hands-on activities. We believe in helping them physically apply what they learn in real life, moving beyond the screen and the textbook. Ready to transform your child's education? Enroll in the Full Program Build Strong Concepts • Real Understanding • Total Confidence Curious Team Learning Private Limited. A Support System to Nurture Every Child.
